title: Tonkotsu Ramen (Community Enhanced)
instructions: Chashu: braise pork belly in soy sauce.
Assemble bowls with broth, noodles, toppings.
Add soft-boiled egg, nori, green onions.
Drizzle with chili oil for heat.
Finish with a splash of sesame oil.

source_review.text: Incredible! I added a splash of sesame oil at the end and topped with corn and butter. Also added a dash of chili oil for heat.

modifications_applied.reasoning: To add additional flavors and textures to the dish

changes_made.to_text: Finish with a splash of sesame oil.
Drizzle with chili oil for heat.

source_review.text: Used chicken broth instead of pork for a lighter version. Added extra green onions and a squeeze of lime.

modifications_applied.reasoning: User wanted a lighter version of the dish by using chicken broth instead of pork broth.

enhancement_summary.expected_impact: To add additional flavors and textures to the dish; User wanted a lighter version of the dish by using chicken broth instead of pork broth.
